sentences.arabic: أَزُورُ طَبِيبَ الْأَسْنَانِ مَرَّتَيْنِ فِي السَّنَةِ لِفَحْصِ أَسْنَانِي.
sentences.translation: Posjećujem stomatologa dva puta godišnje radi pregleda zuba.
sentences.translationEn: I visit the dentist twice a year to check my teeth.

sentences.arabic: أُنَظِّفُ أَسْنَانِي كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ وَمَسَاءٍ بِالْفُرْشَاةِ وَالْمَعْجُونِ.
sentences.translation: Perem zube svako jutro i veče četkicom i pastom.
sentences.translationEn: I brush my teeth every morning and evening with a toothbrush and toothpaste.

sentences.arabic: الِابْتِعَادُ عَنِ السُّكَّرِ يُحَافِظُ عَلَى قُوَّةِ الْأَسْنَانِ وَسَلَامَتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Izbjegavanje šećera čuva čvrstinu i zdravlje zuba.
sentences.translationEn: Staying away from sugar maintains the strength and health of the teeth.
